case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DOMBRIQUE, RICHARD M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $780.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DOMBRIQUE, RICHARD M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-23-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DOMBRIQUE, RICHARD M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-21-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-23-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOMBRIQUE, RICHARD M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-23-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-21-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT CLAIM TO INSURANCE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMBRIQUE, RICHARD M. $780.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $805.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
